experimentalDormancy.isolationRule: Use an experimental/ source path or an explicit featureFlag until production-wired.

entries.rationale: Copies a single legacy plugin-owned board from ~/.lvis/plugins/*/data/board.json into the host-owned work-board namespace without moving or deleting the source.
sunsetCriteria: At least two released app versions have shipped after the migration first shipped.
Support telemetry or release notes show no supported downgrade/import path still creates the legacy plugin board.
The removal PR keeps a regression test proving existing host work-board data is never overwritten or deleted.

entries.rationale: Rewrites pre-#664 reviewer mode disabled to strict so old fail-closed settings do not silently become pass-through LOW after upgrade.
sunsetCriteria: At least two released app versions have shipped after the migration first shipped.
The project has an explicit migration sunset issue confirming old settings files are outside the supported upgrade floor.
The removal PR proves deliberate post-marker disabled settings remain pass-through LOW.

entries.rationale: The canonical settings key is permissions.additionalDirectories. Read-time ignores the old allowedDirectories alias; write-time removes the alias so files converge.
sunsetCriteria: No supported settings writer emits permissions.allowedDirectories.
The removal PR keeps the canonical additionalDirectories round-trip tests.

entries.rationale: The stdio framing loop and child transport are tested foundations for untrusted out-of-process plugins, but the production plugin runtime does not wire them yet.
sunsetCriteria: Promote only with an explicit feature flag or production plugin-runtime wiring plus sandbox coverage.
Delete if no production wiring or feature flag exists by the deleteOrPromoteAfter date.
